title: .workflow.json
description: Per-repo dev-flow contract. Inert JSON read by the dev-flow runner; NOT consumed by any app build. All hooks are shell commands run from the REPO ROOT.

deploy.description: How a merge reaches production. auto-vercel = push to main auto-deploys; ota = mobile over-the-air (separate authorization); native-rebuild = needs a native build, hand back to user; none = no deploy trigger.

packageManager.description: Optional. Default = infer from lockfile (bun.lock->bun, pnpm-lock.yaml->pnpm, package-lock.json->npm, yarn.lock->yarn). When several match, precedence is bun>pnpm>npm>yarn and the repo root is checked before web/; set this explicitly in a monorepo whose app lives in web/ to override that order.

hooks.description: Shell commands run from REPO ROOT; author full paths like "bash web/scripts/x.sh".

prep.description: OPTIONAL: bootstrap a fresh worktree (repo-specific extras only; dev-up covers generic env-seed+install). Absent => rely on dev-up.

gate.description: REQUIRED: full local confidence gate. Nonzero exit = DO NOT ship.

gc.description: OPTIONAL: prune landed worktrees. Absent => fall back to dev-up's generic worktrees-gc.sh.

content.description: OPTIONAL: user-facing surfaces to refresh on user-visible ships.

changelog.description: Path to the changelog source file.

repro.description: OPTIONAL hints for the reasoning layer.

test.description: Command that runs the repro/test suite (e.g. "bun test").

surface.description: Where the change is verified: web | expo | rn.
